module "orders_service" {
  source = "../../modules/orders-service"

  service_name        = "orders-api"
  environment         = var.environment
  aws_region          = var.aws_region
  replica_count       = var.replica_count
  deletion_protection = var.deletion_protection
  invoice_bucket_name = var.invoice_bucket_name
  export_bucket_name  = var.export_bucket_name
}

environment         = "staging"
aws_region          = "eu-west-2"
replica_count       = 1
deletion_protection = false
invoice_bucket_name = "dp-orders-invoices-staging"
export_bucket_name  = "dp-orders-exports-staging"

expected.label: invoice bucket uses the production name
export bucket uses the production name
